content.text: Using the link below, please create price books in SF for our laboratory vendors, Quest and Evexia.  Prices are listed as they are charged to us. If you have questions, please let me know.

requestType.name: General Help Desk Request
requestType.description: Submit a Request or report and issue; fields below are based upon your selection.

status.description: This work item is being actively worked on at the moment by the assignee.
status.name: In Progress

content.text: We have assigned your request HEAL-33066 to an appropriate Help Desk team member. They will reach out to you shortly with an update.
The issue HEAL-33066 has been assigned to me. I’m taking a look now and will keep you updated as I make progress.
Let me know if there’s any additional context that might help.
Hey Sean, any updates on estimated completion here?
Apologies for the delay on this! I just reached out to Adam Geyer for review and approval.  Once I hear back, I can move forward!
Waiting for review and approval from Adam Geyer

I have created the following Price Books, links below. I noticed that 59 of the products are set as inactive. I have wired up everything except for setting them as active. Can I get your approval before I flip them to active?
These look good. What products are you referring to that are marked inactive? I am not seeing anything that is inactive, but maybe I missed something. Thanks!

Updated the products listed here from inactive to active

I have some additional things that need to be adjusted based on the new price book changes we made. Can you help me set up time to talk through this so I submit tickets for the work correctly? Thanks!
